title: iris florentina var. albicans
intro: Iris florentina var. albicans, also known as the white Florentine iris or orris root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. The root of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of orris root include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in perfumery and skincare products due to its sweet, powdery fragrance and potential skin-soothing properties.
